original_syllogism: Alle dingen die dichters zijn, zijn schrijvers. Alle dingen die dichters zijn, zijn creatieve mensen. Hieruit volgt dat sommige creatieve mensen schrijvers zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: All things that are poets are writers. All things poets are creative people. It follows that some creative people are writers.

original_syllogism: 没有一种植物是灌木，又是动物。没有树木是灌木。因此，没有一棵树是动物。
english_translated_syllogism: There is no plant that is both a shrub and an animal. No trees are shrubs. Therefore, no tree is an animal.

original_syllogism: Cada ser humano es un primate. Toda la colección de humanos es un subconjunto de personas. Una parte de las personas no son primates.
english_translated_syllogism: Every human being is a primate. The entire collection of humans is a subset of people. Some people are not primates.

original_syllogism: Hakuna miduara ambayo ni polygons. Kila mduara mmoja ni pembetatu. Kuna pembetatu ambazo sio polygons.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no circles that are polygons. Every single circle is a triangle. There are triangles that are not polygons.

original_syllogism: Все, что является кофе, является жидкостью. Все, что является водой, является жидкостью. В результате немного воды — это не кофе.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is coffee is a liquid. Anything that is water is a liquid. As a result, a little water is not coffee.

original_syllogism: Ningún coche es un avión. También es cierto que ninguna bicicleta es un coche. De ello se deduce que ninguna bicicleta es un avión.
english_translated_syllogism: No car is an airplane. It is also true that no bicycle is a car. It follows that no bicycle is an airplane.

original_syllogism: Er zijn geen zeshoeken die cirkels zijn. Onder de cirkels zijn er enkele vormen met zes zijden. Niet alle vormen met zes zijden zijn zeshoeken.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no hexagons that are circles. Among the circles there are some shapes with six sides. Not all shapes with six sides are hexagons.

original_syllogism: Il n'y a pas de chats qui soient des chiens. Pas un seul poisson n’est un chien. De là, nous pouvons dire que tous les poissons sont des chats.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no cats that are dogs. Not a single fish is a dog. From this we can say that all fish are cats.

original_syllogism: Nenhum animal é um gato. Pelo menos um cachorro é um animal. Há pelo menos um cachorro que é gato.
english_translated_syllogism: No animal is a cat. At least a dog is an animal. There is at least one dog that is a cat.

original_syllogism: Il n'y a pas d'arbres qui soient des mammifères. Il n'y a pas d'arbres qui soient des arbustes. Par conséquent, aucun arbuste n’est un mammifère.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no trees that are mammals. There are no trees that are shrubs. Therefore, no shrub is a mammal.

original_syllogism: Não existe animal que seja mineral. Nenhum cachorro é um mineral. Como resultado, nenhum cachorro é um animal.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no animal that is mineral. No dog is a mineral. As a result, no dog is an animal.

original_syllogism: এটা সত্য যে কিছু কুমির আসবাবপত্র।কুমির যা কিছু তা সরীসৃপ।ফলস্বরূপ, কিছু সরীসৃপ আসবাবপত্র যে ক্ষেত্রে হতে হবে.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that some crocodile furniture. All crocodiles are reptiles. As a result, some reptile furniture must be in that case.

original_syllogism: Er zijn geen dieren die rotsen zijn. Het is ook waar dat geen enkele vogel rotsen is. Daarom wordt betoogd dat er geen vogels zijn die dieren zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no animals that are rocks. It is also true that no bird is rocks. Therefore, it is argued that there are no birds that are animals.

original_syllogism: Дело не в том, что газированные напитки — это вода. Вся существующая вода является напитком. Некоторые из существующих напитков не являются газировкой.
english_translated_syllogism: It's not that carbonated drinks are water. All existing water is a drink. Some of the existing drinks are not soda.

original_syllogism: జీవుడు మరియు జంతువు రెండూ లేవు. మనిషి అని తెలిసిన ఏ ఒక్క వస్తువు కూడా జీవి కాదు. మానవులలో కొంత భాగం జంతువులు కాదని ఇది నిరూపిస్తుంది.
english_translated_syllogism: Neither living being nor animal exists. No single thing known as man is a living being. This proves that some part of humans are not animals.

original_syllogism: Non esiste persona intelligente che sia anche un corridore lento. Non esiste atleta che corra lentamente. Ciò significa che gli atleti non sono persone intelligenti.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no intelligent person who is also a slow runner. There is no athlete who runs slowly. This means that athletes are not intelligent people.

original_syllogism: Het is zo dat sommige muzikanten zangers zijn. Het is ook waar dat sommige dansers muzikanten zijn. Uit deze uitspraken kun je concluderen dat sommige dansers zangers zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that some musicians are singers. It is also true that some dancers are musicians. From these statements you can conclude that some dancers are singers.

original_syllogism: Ogni singola persona che è medico è un operatore sanitario. Un ingegnere non è un operatore sanitario. Da ciò si può concludere che nessun ingegnere è un medico.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single person who is a doctor is a healthcare worker. An engineer is not a healthcare professional. From this it can be concluded that no engineer is a doctor.

original_syllogism: Не существует такой вещи, как здание, которое было бы стулом. Верно также и то, что ни один стул не является домом. Отсюда следует, что ни один дом не является зданием.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no such thing as a building that is a chair. It is also true that no chair is a home. It follows that no house is a building.

original_syllogism: El oxígeno es algo que es un elemento. Es imposible que el agua sea un elemento. Nada de lo que es agua es oxígeno.
english_translated_syllogism: Oxygen is something that is an element. It is impossible for water to be an element. Nothing that is water is oxygen.

original_syllogism: Ни один фрукт не является одновременно и выпечкой. Ни одна выпечка не является камнем. В результате ни один камень не является фруктом.
english_translated_syllogism: No fruit is also a pastry. No baked goods are set in stone. As a result, no stone is a fruit.

original_syllogism: Cada animal es una nube. Todos los animales son perros. Esto significa que cada perro es una nube.
english_translated_syllogism: Each animal is a cloud. All animals are dogs. This means that every dog ​​is a cloud.

original_syllogism: Tout ce qui est une chaise est un meuble. Chaque objet qui est une chaise de bureau est une chaise. On peut en conclure que chaque chaise de bureau est un meuble.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a chair is furniture. Every object that is an office chair is a chair. We can conclude that every office chair is a piece of furniture.

original_syllogism: 任何职业都是需要技能的工作。作为一名医生行医是一种职业。因此，所有医生都必须具备技能。
english_translated_syllogism: Any profession requires skills. Practicing medicine as a doctor is a profession. Therefore, all doctors must have skills.

original_syllogism: చెంచా అయిన ప్రతి ఒక్క వస్తువు సంగీత వాయిద్యమే. ఫోర్క్ అయిన ఏదైనా వస్తువు ఒక చెంచా. అందువల్ల, అన్ని ఫోర్క్‌లు సంగీత వాయిద్యాలే అని చెప్పాలి.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single thing that is a spoon is a musical instrument. Anything that is a fork is a spoon. Therefore, all forks are musical instruments.

original_syllogism: Het is waar dat geen enkele auto een boot is. Het is een feit dat sedans geen boten zijn. Daarom zijn sommige sedans auto's.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that no car is a boat. The fact is that sedans are not boats. That's why some sedans are cars.

original_syllogism: Todo lo que es un número nunca es un concepto. Un subconjunto de números enteros está compuesto de números. Por tanto, algunos números enteros no son conceptos.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a number is never a concept. A subset of integers is made up of numbers. Therefore, some integers are not concepts.

original_syllogism: Jeder Politiker ist ein Reptil. Es gibt einige Politiker, die Premierminister sind. Daraus muss man schließen, dass ein Teil der Premierminister Reptilien sind.
english_translated_syllogism: Every politician is a reptile. There are some politicians who are prime ministers. From this one must conclude that some of the prime ministers are reptiles.

original_syllogism: O conjunto das cobras e o conjunto dos lagartos são mutuamente exclusivos. Cada lagarto é um réptil. É uma consequência lógica que alguns répteis não sejam cobras.
english_translated_syllogism: The snake set and the lizard set are mutually exclusive. Every lizard is a reptile. It is a logical consequence that some reptiles are not snakes.

original_syllogism: Kein einziger Politiker ist ein Kind. Es stimmt auch, dass kein Schauspieler ein Politiker ist. Daraus folgt, dass kein Schauspieler ein Kind ist.
english_translated_syllogism: Not a single politician is a child. It is also true that no actor is a politician. It follows that no actor is a child.

original_syllogism: Tout ce qui est objet peut chanter de l'opéra. Il arrive que certaines lampes ne puissent pas chanter l'opéra. Cela conduit logiquement à la conclusion que certaines lampes ne sont pas des objets.
english_translated_syllogism: Anything that is an object can sing opera. Sometimes some lamps cannot sing opera. This logically leads to the conclusion that some lamps are not objects.

original_syllogism: একটি ইলেকট্রনিক ডিভাইস একটি পর্দা সঙ্গে কোন বস্তু নেই. একটি ল্যাপটপ যে একটি জিনিস একটি পর্দা সঙ্গে একটি বস্তু নয়. এটি থেকে, আমরা অনুমান করতে পারি যে কিছু ল্যাপটপ ইলেকট্রনিক ডিভাইস নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: An electronic device has no object with a screen. A laptop is not an object with a screen that is a thing. From this, we can infer that some laptops are not electronic devices.

original_syllogism: জীব কখনো কথা বলতে পারে না।প্রতিটি মানুষই একটি জীবন্ত প্রাণী।তাই কোনো মানুষ কথা বলতে পারে না।
english_translated_syllogism: A living being can never speak. Every human being is a living being. So no human being can speak.

original_syllogism: Все, что является камнем, не является живым существом. Часть вещей, которые являются камнями, также являются камнями. Отсюда можно сделать вывод, что некоторые камни не являются живыми существами.
english_translated_syllogism: Anything that is a stone is not a living thing. Some things that are stones are also stones. From this we can conclude that some stones are not living beings.

original_syllogism: 所有松鼠都有毛皮。有一些松鼠也是树。这意味着一定数量的树木是有毛皮的生物。
english_translated_syllogism: All squirrels have fur. Some squirrels are also trees. This means that a certain number of trees are furry creatures.

original_syllogism: De groep asteroïden en de groep dieren sluiten elkaar uit. Er zijn geen vruchten die dieren zijn. Asteroïden en fruit behoren niet tot dezelfde categorie.
english_translated_syllogism: The group of asteroids and the group of animals are mutually exclusive. There are no fruits that are animals. Asteroids and fruits are not in the same category.

original_syllogism: Il n’existe pas d’araignées qui soient des mammifères. Aucun insecte n'est considéré comme une araignée. Certains insectes ne sont pas des mammifères.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no spiders that are mammals. No insect is considered a spider. Some insects are not mammals.

original_syllogism: Chaque prêtre est un homme. Tous les prêtres sont humains. Il s’ensuit que certains humains ne sont pas des hommes.
english_translated_syllogism: Every priest is a man. All priests are human. It follows that some humans are not men.

original_syllogism: Kila ua ni mnyama. Hakuna Rose ni mnyama. Kuna maua ambayo sio maua.
english_translated_syllogism: Every flower is an animal. No Rose is an animal. There are flowers that are not flowers.

original_syllogism: O conjunto de letras do alfabeto e o conjunto de números são disjuntos. Cada número é uma vogal. Portanto, algumas vogais não são letras do alfabeto.
english_translated_syllogism: The set of letters of the alphabet and the set of numbers are disjoint. Each number is a vowel. Therefore, some vowels are not letters of the alphabet.

original_syllogism: Er bestaan ​​geen wezens die roofdieren zijn. Het is ook waar dat geen enkele prooi dieren zijn. Uit deze twee uitspraken kan worden geconcludeerd dat sommige prooien roofdieren zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: Creatures that are predators do not exist. It is also true that no prey are animals. From these two statements it can be concluded that some prey are predators.

original_syllogism: Es cierto que algunos libros contienen imágenes. Cada libro es un material impreso. Por lo tanto, algunos materiales impresos tienen imágenes.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that some books contain images. Each book is a printed material. Therefore, some printed materials have images.

original_syllogism: Non ci sono uccelli che siano mammiferi. Nessun pipistrello è considerato uccello. Alcuni pipistrelli non sono mammiferi.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no birds that are mammals. No bats are considered birds. Some bats are not mammals.

original_syllogism: 没有一张椅子是桌子。所有躺椅都是椅子。由此可见，有些躺椅不是桌子。
english_translated_syllogism: None of the chairs are tables. All recliners are chairs. It follows that some recliners are not tables.

original_syllogism: No hay vacas que sean reptiles. No es cierto que cualquier lagarto sea una vaca. Se da el caso de que algunas lagartijas son vacas.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no cows that are reptiles. It is not true that any lizard is a cow. It is the case that some lizards are cows.

original_syllogism: I metalli non sono in alcun modo elementi. Non esistono elementi che siano solidi. È vero che nessun metallo è solido.
english_translated_syllogism: Metals are not elements in any way. There are no elements that are solid. It is true that no metal is solid.

original_syllogism: ప్రతి ఒక్క మానవుడు క్షీరదమే. కీటకాలు అంటే క్షీరదాలు లేవు. ఏ కీటకం మానవుడు కాదని ఇది అనుసరిస్తుంది.
english_translated_syllogism: Every human being is a mammal. Insects are not mammals. It follows that no insect is human.

original_syllogism: పిల్లులు కుక్కలు కావు. కుక్కలు ఏనుగులు కావు. అందువల్ల కొన్ని ఏనుగులు పిల్లులు అని అనుసరిస్తుంది.
english_translated_syllogism: Cats are not dogs. Dogs are not elephants. It therefore follows that some elephants are cats.

original_syllogism: Tout ce qui est une voiture est aussi un moyen de transport. Certaines voitures, qui sont des véhicules, peuvent être trouvées. Cela implique qu'une partie des véhicules sont des modes de transport.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a car is also a means of transportation. Some cars, which are vehicles, can be found. This implies that some vehicles are modes of transport.

original_syllogism: Jedes einzelne Rind ist ein Insekt. Nichts, was eine Kuh ist, ist ein Insekt. Man kann sagen, dass einige Kühe keine Rinder sind.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single cow is an insect. Nothing that a cow is is an insect. It can be said that some cows are not cattle.

original_syllogism: Не существует пауков, которые являются млекопитающими. Ни одно насекомое не считается пауком. Некоторые насекомые не являются млекопитающими.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no spiders that are mammals. No insect is considered a spider. Some insects are not mammals.

original_syllogism: పక్షులు అనే క్షీరదాలు లేవు. ఏదైనా సరీసృపాలు క్షీరదమే అన్నది నిజం కాదు. కొన్ని సరీసృపాలు పక్షులు అనే విషయం ఇది.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no mammals called birds. It is not true that any reptile is a mammal. This is the case that some reptiles are birds.

original_syllogism: Hakuna televisheni ambazo sio hisia. Ni ukweli kwamba kila mhemko ni kiumbe mdogo. Hii inasababisha hitimisho kwamba mambo kadhaa madogo ni televisheni.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no television that is not emotional. It is a fact that every emotion is a small being. This leads to the conclusion that several small things are television.

original_syllogism: Alle gereedschappen zijn dingen die kunnen worden omschreven als gemaakt van metaal. Het is zo dat geen enkele hamer iets van metaal is. Het is dus zo dat geen enkele hamer een stuk gereedschap is.
english_translated_syllogism: All tools are things that can be described as made of metal. The fact is that no hammer is a metal thing. So it is true that no hammer is a tool.

original_syllogism: 并非所有羽毛都是纸制成的。没有一本书是一根羽毛。因此，没有一本书是纸做的。
english_translated_syllogism: Not all feathers are made of paper. No book is a feather. Therefore, no book is made of paper.

original_syllogism: O conjunto dos animais aquáticos não tem intersecção com o conjunto dos vertebrados com brânquias. Todos os peixes são vertebrados com guelras. Os peixes não podem ser considerados animais aquáticos.
english_translated_syllogism: The set of aquatic animals does not intersect with the set of vertebrates with gills. All fish are vertebrates with gills. Fish cannot be considered aquatic animals.

original_syllogism: Alles wat een stoel is, is een vloeistof. Alles wat een stoel is, is een gas. Bijgevolg zijn sommige gassen vloeistoffen.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a chair is a liquid. Everything that is a chair is a gas. Consequently, some gases are liquids.

original_syllogism: Não existe vegetal que também seja uma baga. Alguns dos itens que são frutas não são bagas. Segue-se que algumas frutas não são vegetais.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no vegetable that is also a berry. Some of the items that are fruits are not berries. It follows that some fruits are not vegetables.

original_syllogism: Manche Tiere sind keine Fleischfresser. Es gibt einige Löwen, die Tiere sind. Folglich ist jeder Löwe ein Fleischfresser.
english_translated_syllogism: Some animals are not carnivores. There are some lions that are animals. Consequently, every lion is a carnivore.

original_syllogism: Les tables et les canapés ne se chevauchent pas. Une partie des canapés sont des meubles. Certains meubles ne sont pas des tables.
english_translated_syllogism: Tables and sofas do not overlap. Some of the sofas are furniture. Some furniture is not tables.

original_syllogism: Não existem plantas que sejam vegetais que também possam ser chamadas de carnívoras. Todo repolho é um vegetal. Portanto, nenhum repolho é carnívoro.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no plants that are vegetables that can also be called carnivorous. All cabbage is a vegetable. Therefore, no cabbage is carnivorous.

original_syllogism: 一切自行车都是带有踏板的交通工具。该滑板组不包含带有踏板的车辆。存在不是自行车的滑板。
english_translated_syllogism: All bicycles are vehicles with pedals. This skateboard group does not include vehicles with pedals. There are skateboards that are not bicycles.

original_syllogism: 没有椅子是桌子。有些桌子是家具。这意味着有些家具不是椅子。
english_translated_syllogism: No chairs are tables. Some tables are furniture. This means that some of the furniture is not chairs.

original_syllogism: Acontece que nenhuma carne é algo que cresce no solo. Cada vegetal é algo que cresce no solo. Pode-se deduzir que existem alguns vegetais que não são carnes.
english_translated_syllogism: It turns out that no meat is something that grows in the ground. Every vegetable is something that grows in the ground. It can be deduced that there are some vegetables that are not meat.

original_syllogism: Existem algumas plantas que são computadores. Cada computador é uma máquina. Assim, algumas máquinas são plantas.
english_translated_syllogism: There are some plants that are computers. Every computer is a machine. Thus, some machines are plants.

original_syllogism: Ni kesi kwamba hakuna nambari ni sehemu. Pia sio kesi kwamba decimal yoyote ni sehemu. Kwa hivyo, decimals zote ni nambari.
english_translated_syllogism: It is the case that no number is a part. It is also not the case that any decimal is a fraction. Therefore, all decimals are numbers.

original_syllogism: Hakuna simba ambao ni mamalia. Hakuna tembo anayezingatiwa simba. Tembo wengine sio mamalia.
english_translated_syllogism: No lion is a mammal. No elephant is considered a lion. Some elephants are not mammals.

original_syllogism: Ce n’est pas vrai que tous les chiens sont des caniches. Toute créature qui est un chien est un chien. Il s’ensuit donc que certains chiens ne sont pas des caniches.
english_translated_syllogism: It is not true that all dogs are poodles. Any creature that is a dog is a dog. So it follows that some dogs are not poodles.

original_syllogism: উপন্যাস কোনোভাবেই নন-ফিকশন বই নয়।উপন্যাস যা কিছু তা একটি বই।এটা এমন যে কিছু বই নন-ফিকশন বই নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: A novel is not a non-fiction book by any means. A novel is anything but a book. It is just that some books are not non-fiction books.

original_syllogism: Algunas criaturas que son lagartos no son animales. Todo lo que es un lagarto es un reptil. Por tanto, se puede concluir que algunos reptiles no son animales.
english_translated_syllogism: Some creatures that are lizards are not animals. Everything that is a lizard is a reptile. Therefore, it can be concluded that some reptiles are not animals.

original_syllogism: Kila buibui moja ni chombo cha muziki. Chochote ambacho ni tarantula ni buibui. Kwa hivyo, tarantulas zingine ni vyombo vya muziki.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single spider is a musical instrument. Anything that is a tarantula is a spider. Therefore, some tarantulas are musical instruments.

original_syllogism: Não existem peixes que sejam insetos. É fato que nenhum inseto é um animal aquático. Isto leva à conclusão de que alguns animais aquáticos são peixes.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no fish that are insects. It is a fact that no insect is an aquatic animal. This leads to the conclusion that some aquatic animals are fish.

original_syllogism: Il n’est pas vrai que les animaux à sang chaud soient des reptiles. Certains animaux à sang chaud sont des chiens. Les chiens ne sont donc pas des reptiles.
english_translated_syllogism: It is not true that warm-blooded animals are reptiles. Some warm-blooded animals are dogs. Dogs are therefore not reptiles.

original_syllogism: No hay leones que sean gacelas. También se da el caso de que ningún tigre es una gacela. Por tanto, ningún tigre es un león.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no lions that are gazelles. It is also the case that no tiger is a gazelle. Therefore, no tiger is a lion.

original_syllogism: একটি গ্রহ যা একটি স্বর্গীয় বস্তু হতে পারে না. পৃথিবী যা কিছু তা একটি গ্রহ।তাই এই সিদ্ধান্তে আসা যায় যে কোন পৃথিবীই মহাকাশীয় বস্তু নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: A planet which cannot be a celestial body. Everything that is earth is a planet. So it can be concluded that no earth is a celestial body.

original_syllogism: Er zijn geen zoogdieren die insecten zijn. Het is ook waar dat geen enkele hond insecten is. Daarom wordt beweerd dat er geen honden zijn die zoogdieren zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no mammals that are insects. It is also true that no dogs are insects. Therefore, it is claimed that there are no dogs that are mammals.

original_syllogism: Todo lo que sea un planeta orbita una estrella. Cada cosa en la Tierra es un planeta. Existe al menos una parte de la Tierra que orbita una estrella.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a planet orbits a star. Every thing on Earth is a planet. There is at least a part of the Earth that orbits a star.

original_syllogism: Hakuna samaki ambao ni mamalia. Hakuna mamalia ambao ni miamba. Inafuata kwamba miamba kadhaa ni samaki.
english_translated_syllogism: No fish are mammals. No mammals are rocks. It follows that several rocks are fish.

original_syllogism: గ్రహాలు అని చంద్రులు ఉండరు. ఏ నక్షత్రాలు చంద్రులు కావు అనే విషయం కూడా ఇదే. దీని నుండి, కొన్ని నక్షత్రాలు గ్రహాలు అని చెప్పబడింది.
english_translated_syllogism: Moons are not planets. The same is true of which stars are not moons. From this, some stars are said to be planets.

original_syllogism: Non una sola cosa che sia un edificio è un albero. Una parte delle cose che sono case sono edifici. Quindi è chiaro che alcune case non sono alberi.
english_translated_syllogism: Not a single thing that is a building is a tree. Some of the things that are houses are buildings. So it is clear that some houses are not trees.

original_syllogism: একটি বড় মেশিন একটি যানবাহন নয়।জানা যায়, ট্রাকের একটি অংশ বড় মেশিন।এটি নিশ্চিত করে যে বেশ কয়েকটি ট্রাক যানবাহন নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: A large machine is not a vehicle. Obviously, a part of a truck is a large machine. This ensures that several trucks are not vehicles.

original_syllogism: No se trata de que cada llave sea un objeto. Todo lo que sea una llave inglesa es una herramienta. Por tanto, se puede concluir que algunas herramientas no son objetos.
english_translated_syllogism: It is not that each key is an object. Anything that is a wrench is a tool. Therefore, it can be concluded that some tools are not objects.

original_syllogism: এমন কোন কুকুর নেই যে বিড়াল।এমন কোন বিড়াল নেই যা পশু।সুতরাং, প্রাণীদের একটি অংশ কুকুর।
english_translated_syllogism: There is no such thing as a dog that is a cat. There is no such thing as a cat that is an animal. Therefore, a subset of animals is dog.

original_syllogism: Es gibt keinen Kreis, der ein Dreieck ist. Kein Dreieck ist überhaupt ein Quadrat. Daher ist kein Quadrat ein Kreis.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no circle that is a triangle. No triangle is a square at all. Therefore no square is a circle.

original_syllogism: Niente di ciò che è pianta è un animale. Almeno un frutto è una pianta. Almeno un frutto è un animale.
english_translated_syllogism: Nothing that is a plant is an animal. At least one fruit is a plant. At least one fruit is an animal.

original_syllogism: ఒక్క క్షీరదం కూడా పక్షి కాదు. కొన్ని పెంపుడు జంతువులు క్షీరదాలు ఉన్నాయి. అందువలన, కొన్ని పెంపుడు జంతువులు పక్షులు.
english_translated_syllogism: Not a single mammal is a bird. Some pets are mammals. Therefore, some pets are birds.

original_syllogism: No hay animales que también sean plantas. De los elementos que son mamíferos, una parte no son plantas. De ello se deduce que algunos mamíferos no son animales.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no animals that are also plants. Of the elements that are mammals, a part are not plants. It follows that some mammals are not animals.

original_syllogism: Es gibt keine Fleischfresser, die auch Pflanzenfresser sind. Es wird davon ausgegangen, dass eine Reihe von Löwen Fleischfresser sind. Daher sind einige Löwen keine Pflanzenfresser.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no carnivores who are also herbivores. A number of lions are believed to be carnivores. Therefore, some lions are not herbivores.

original_syllogism: Não há professores que sejam alunos. Não é verdade que qualquer estudante seja um profissional. Um certo número de profissionais não são professores.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no teachers who are students. It is not true that any student is a professional. A certain number of professionals are not teachers.

original_syllogism: প্রতিটি পত্রিকাই একটি সাময়িকী।কিছু চিঠি সাময়িকী নয়।এটি যৌক্তিকভাবে এই উপসংহারে নিয়ে যায় যে কিছু চিঠি পত্রিকা নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: Every newspaper is a periodical. Some letters are not periodicals. This logically leads to the conclusion that some letters are not periodicals.

original_syllogism: Nessun elefante è un velocista professionista. Ogni singolo individuo che è un velocista olimpico è un velocista professionista. Ne consegue che una parte dei velocisti olimpici non sono elefanti.
english_translated_syllogism: No elephant is a professional sprinter. Every single individual who is an Olympic sprinter is a professional sprinter. It follows that a part of the Olympic sprinters are not elephants.

original_syllogism: Il est vrai qu’aucun carré n’a quatre côtés égaux. Tous les carrés parfaits sont des choses qui sont des carrés. La conclusion selon laquelle certains carrés parfaits n’ont pas quatre côtés égaux est nécessairement vraie.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that no square has four equal sides. All perfect squares are things that are squares. The conclusion that some perfect squares do not have four equal sides is necessarily true.

original_syllogism: 每只贵宾犬都是一只狗。所有贵宾犬都是动物。动物的一个子集不是狗。
english_translated_syllogism: Every poodle is a dog. All poodles are animals. A subset of animals are not dogs.

original_syllogism: Tudo o que é um livro também é um objeto. É impossível que um objeto seja um sentimento. Portanto, podemos deduzir que alguns sentimentos não são livros.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a book is also an object. It is impossible for an object to be a feeling. Therefore, we can deduce that some feelings are not books.

original_syllogism: Hakuna kitu ambacho ni sura ambayo ni takwimu ya jiometri. Duru zote ni takwimu za jiometri. Inafuata kutoka kwa hii kwamba duru zingine sio maumbo.
english_translated_syllogism: There is nothing that is a shape that is a geometric figure. All circles are geometric figures. It follows from this that some circles are not shapes.

original_syllogism: Er is geen enkele cirkel die een veelhoek is. Elke vorm die een driehoek is, is een veelhoek. Driehoeken zijn geen cirkels.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no circle that is a polygon. Any shape that is a triangle is a polygon. Triangles are not circles.

original_syllogism: Elke kunstenaar is een creatief persoon. Elke schilder is een creatief persoon. Daarom zijn alle schilders kunstenaars.
english_translated_syllogism: Every artist is a creative person. Every painter is a creative person. That's why all painters are artists.

original_syllogism: Jede einzelne Tasse kann als Behälter bezeichnet werden. Es gibt keine Behälter, die Gefühle sind. Es ist daher eine gute Schlussfolgerung, dass manche Gefühle keine Tassen sind.
english_translated_syllogism: Each individual cup can be called a container. There are no containers that are feelings. It is therefore a good conclusion that some feelings are not cups.

original_syllogism: Alles wat een leraar is, is een professional. Er zijn docenten die docenten zijn. Daarom zijn sommige docenten professionals.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything a teacher is is a professional. There are teachers who are teachers. That's why some teachers are professionals.

original_syllogism: Entre los estudiantes, algunos han aprendido a codificar. Se considera que todos los que han aprendido a codificar han aprendido una habilidad. De ello se deduce que algunos de los que han aprendido una habilidad son estudiantes.
english_translated_syllogism: Among the students, some have learned to code. Everyone who has learned to code is considered to have learned a skill. It follows that some of those who have learned a skill are students.

original_syllogism: చేప ఏదైనా క్షీరదం కాదు. చేపలు అని తిమింగలాలు లేవు. పర్యవసానంగా, ప్రతి తిమింగలం సరీసృపాలు.
english_translated_syllogism: A fish is not any mammal. There are no whales that are fish. Consequently, every whale is a reptile.

original_syllogism: కుక్కలు అనే జంతువులు కొన్ని ఉన్నాయి. పిల్లులన్నీ జంతువులే అన్నది కూడా నిజం. ఈ రెండు ప్రకటనల నుండి, కొన్ని పిల్లులు కుక్కలు కాదని నిర్ధారించవచ్చు.
english_translated_syllogism: There are some animals called dogs. It is also true that all cats are animals. From these two statements, it can be concluded that some cats are not dogs.

original_syllogism: 形状事物的一部分也是四边形。在正方形的事物中，有些是形状的。由此，我们可以说并非所有的正方形都是四边形。
english_translated_syllogism: Part of a shape thing is also a quadrilateral. Among things that are square, some are shapes. From this, we can say that not all squares are quadrilaterals.

original_syllogism: Bidhaa yoyote iliyoainishwa kama meza ina uso ambao uko gorofa juu. Vipande kadhaa vya fanicha ya ofisi ni meza. Kwa hivyo, fanicha zingine za ofisi zina uso wa gorofa juu.
english_translated_syllogism: Any product classified as a table has a surface that is flat on top. Several pieces of office furniture are tables. Therefore, some office furniture has a flat surface on top.

original_syllogism: У каждого позвоночного есть позвоночник. Все существа, относящиеся к человеку, являются позвоночными. По крайней мере, у некоторых людей есть позвоночник.
english_translated_syllogism: Every vertebrate has a backbone. All creatures related to humans are vertebrates. At least some people have a backbone.

original_syllogism: Unter den Künstlern sind einige Wissenschaftler. Jeder einzelne Künstler ist ein Musiker. Es muss so sein, dass kein einziger Musiker ein Künstler ist.
english_translated_syllogism: Some of the artists include scientists. Every single artist is a musician. It must be the case that not a single musician is an artist.

original_syllogism: Vitu vyote ambavyo ni mijusi ni vertebrates. Idadi ya mijusi pia ni reptilia. Kwa hivyo, reptilia zingine ni vertebrates.
english_translated_syllogism: All things that are lizards are vertebrates. A number of lizards are also reptiles. Therefore, some reptiles are vertebrates.

original_syllogism: Alle Stühle sind Wolken. Keine der Wolken ist ein Möbelstück. Daher ist kein Möbelstück ein Stuhl.
english_translated_syllogism: All chairs are clouds. None of the clouds are pieces of furniture. Therefore, no piece of furniture is a chair.

original_syllogism: Eine bestimmte Anzahl von Studenten sind Sportler. Unter den Teenagern sind einige Studenten. Dies lässt uns feststellen, dass einige Teenager keine Sportler sind.
english_translated_syllogism: A certain number of students are athletes. There are some students among the teenagers. This makes us realize that some teenagers are not athletes.

original_syllogism: Es gibt keine Flüssigkeiten, die tierischen Ursprungs sind. Es stimmt auch, dass keine Tische Flüssigkeiten sind. Daher gibt es keine Tische mit Tieren.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no liquids that are of animal origin. It is also true that no tables are liquids. Therefore there are no tables with animals.

original_syllogism: É verdade que nenhuma rocha é uma coisa inanimada. Nenhuma árvore é rocha. Segue-se que todas as árvores são coisas não vivas.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that no rock is an inanimate thing. No tree is a rock. It follows that all trees are non-living things.

original_syllogism: Gli individui che sono scrittori non sono, in alcun modo, persone. Ogni scrittore è un individuo che scrive libri. Le persone non sono scrittori.
english_translated_syllogism: Individuals who are writers are not, in any way, people. Every writer is an individual who writes books. People are not writers.

original_syllogism: Ряд птиц — пингвины. Все пингвины — нелетающие животные. Следовательно, некоторые нелетающие животные являются птицами.
english_translated_syllogism: A number of birds are penguins. All penguins are flightless animals. Therefore, some flightless animals are birds.

original_syllogism: 任何有电话的东西都是鸟。所有鸟类都是由液体光构成的。从这些事实来看，很明显，手机是由液态光制成的一些东西。
english_translated_syllogism: Anything with a phone is a bird. All birds are made of liquid light. From these facts, it's clear that the phone is made of something made of liquid light.

original_syllogism: 没有鸟类是哺乳动物。没有鱼类是哺乳动物。因此，有些鱼是鸟类。
english_translated_syllogism: No birds are mammals. No fish are mammals. Therefore, some fish are birds.

original_syllogism: Absolument aucun chien n’est un amphibien. Aucun chat n’est amphibien. La seule conclusion est qu’aucun chat n’est un chien.
english_translated_syllogism: Absolutely no dog is an amphibian. No cat is amphibian. The only conclusion is that no cat is a dog.

original_syllogism: 任何鸟都有翅膀。每只昆虫都有翅膀。这意味着所有昆虫都是鸟类。
english_translated_syllogism: Every bird has wings. Every insect has wings. This means that all insects are birds.

original_syllogism: Дело в том, что ни одно земноводное не является птицей. Все лягушки относятся к категории амфибий. Отсюда логически следует, что никакие лягушки не являются птицами.
english_translated_syllogism: The fact is that not a single amphibian is a bird. All frogs belong to the category of amphibians. It logically follows that no frogs are birds.

original_syllogism: Existem flores que não são animais. Cada flor é uma planta. Segue-se que nem uma única planta é um animal.
english_translated_syllogism: There are flowers that are not animals. Each flower is a plant. It follows that not a single plant is an animal.

original_syllogism: এমন কোন কুকুর নেই যা বিড়াল।কিছু বিড়াল একটি বিড়াল।এটি অনুসরণ করে যে কোনও বিড়াল কুকুর নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: There is no dog that is a cat. Some cat is a cat. It follows that no cat is a dog.

original_syllogism: Não existem vegetais que sejam frutas. Tudo que é vegetal é planta. Acontece que algumas plantas deixam de ser frutos.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no vegetables that are fruits. Everything that is vegetable is a plant. It happens that some plants stop being fruitful.

original_syllogism: 每只蝴蝶都不是蚂蚁。有一些昆虫是蚂蚁。由此可见，有些昆虫不是蝴蝶。
english_translated_syllogism: Every butterfly is not an ant. Some insects are ants. It follows that some insects are not butterflies.

original_syllogism: যে কোন বস্তু যে একটি সেতু একটি মাছ. গোল্ডেন গেট মাছ নয়।এটি বোঝায় যে গোল্ডেন গেটটি সেতু নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: Any object that bridges a fish. The Golden Gate is not a fish. This means that the Golden Gate is not a bridge.

original_syllogism: Il est vrai qu'aucun chien n'est un chat. Aucun animal de compagnie n'est un chien. Il s’ensuit qu’aucun animal de compagnie n’est un chat.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that no dog is a cat. No pet is a dog. It follows that no pet is a cat.

original_syllogism: Hakuna baiskeli ambazo ni magari. Kila baiskeli moja ni gari. Magari mengine yanashindwa kuwa magari.
english_translated_syllogism: No bikes are cars. Every single bicycle is a car. Some cars fail to be cars.

original_syllogism: Есть камни, которые не легкие. Нет перьев, которые были бы камнями. Следовательно, каждое перо легкое.
english_translated_syllogism: There are stones that are not light. There are no feathers that are stones. Therefore, each feather is light.

original_syllogism: বিড়াল বলে কোনো স্তন্যপায়ী প্রাণী নেই।কোনো বিড়ালই কুকুর নয়।ফলস্বরূপ, এটি উপসংহারে আসা যেতে পারে যে সমস্ত কুকুরই স্তন্যপায়ী।
english_translated_syllogism: There is no mammal called a cat. No cat is a dog. Consequently, it can be concluded that all dogs are mammals.

original_syllogism: Набор животных и набор растений исключают друг друга. Группа растений и группа кошек не пересекаются. Определенное количество кошек не являются животными.
english_translated_syllogism: The set of animals and the set of plants are mutually exclusive. A group of plants and a group of cats do not intersect. A certain number of cats are not animals.

original_syllogism: Die Gruppe der Sterne und die Gruppe der Monde sind völlig getrennt. Die Mondgruppe und die Planetengruppe sind disjunkt. Folglich sind einige Planeten keine Sterne.
english_translated_syllogism: The group of stars and the group of moons are completely separate. The lunar group and the planetary group are disjoint. Consequently, some planets are not stars.

original_syllogism: Non esiste una rana che sia un mammifero. Niente di ciò che è un rettile è un mammifero. Si può concludere che nessuna rana è un rettile.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no such thing as a frog that is a mammal. Nothing that is a reptile is a mammal. It can be concluded that no frog is a reptile.

original_syllogism: Ni kweli kwamba kila mto ni mwili wa maji. Miili yote ya maji inachukuliwa kuwa matukio ya asili. Kwa hivyo tunaweza kuhitimisha kuwa matukio fulani ya asili ni mito.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that every river is a body of water. All bodies of water are considered natural phenomena. So we can conclude that some natural phenomena are rivers.

original_syllogism: Не существует фруктов, которые являются планетами. Не существует планеты, которая была бы мясом. Следует сделать вывод, что некоторые виды мяса не являются фруктами.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no fruits that are planets. There is no planet that is meat. It should be concluded that some types of meat are not fruits.

original_syllogism: Ni kesi kwamba hakuna matunda ni machungwa. Kila machungwa moja ni machungwa. Inafuata kutoka kwa hii kwamba machungwa kadhaa sio matunda.
english_translated_syllogism: It is the case that no fruit is orange. Every single orange is an orange. It follows from this that some oranges are not fruits.

original_syllogism: Es gibt keine Vögel, die Fische sind. Es stimmt auch, dass kein Fisch ein Säugetier ist. Man könnte daraus schließen, dass keine Säugetiere Vögel sind.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no birds that are fish. It is also true that no fish is a mammal. One might conclude that no mammals are birds.

original_syllogism: Ni kweli kwamba waganga wengine ni wataalamu. Waganga wote wanachukuliwa kuwa madaktari. Kwa hivyo, inafuata kimantiki kuwa madaktari wengine ni wataalamu.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that some healers are specialists. All healers are considered doctors. Therefore, it logically follows that some doctors are specialists.

original_syllogism: పక్షులు ఏ విధంగానూ చేపలు కావు. ఉభయచరాలు అనే చేపలు లేవు. ఉభయచరాలు ఏ విధంగానూ పక్షులు కావు.
english_translated_syllogism: Birds are not fish by any means. There are no fish that are amphibians. Amphibians are not birds in any way.

original_syllogism: Non esiste gatto che sia un uccello. Nessun uccello è un cane. È possibile concludere che nessun cane è un gatto.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no cat that is a bird. No bird is a dog. It is possible to conclude that no dog is a cat.

original_syllogism: È vero che nessuna maglietta è un pantalone. Tutte le magliette sono cose che sono camicie. Pertanto, alcune magliette non sono pantaloni.
english_translated_syllogism: It's true that no shirt is a pair of pants. All shirts are things that are shirts. Therefore, some shirts are not pants.

original_syllogism: Cada livro é uma pessoa. Todos os livros são feitos de água. Portanto, algumas coisas feitas de água são pessoas.
english_translated_syllogism: Each book is a person. All books are made of water. Therefore, some things made of water are people.

original_syllogism: ప్రతి మనిషి రోబో. పిల్లలైన ఏ వ్యక్తి అయినా మానవుడే. ప్రతి బిడ్డ రోబో అని నిర్ధారించవచ్చు.
english_translated_syllogism: Every man is a robot. Any person who is a child is a human being. It can be concluded that every child is a robot.

original_syllogism: Los científicos no son de ninguna manera profesores. No existen profesores que sean académicos. Es cierto que ningún científico es académico.
english_translated_syllogism: Scientists are in no way teachers. There are no teachers who are academics. It is true that no scientist is an academic.

original_syllogism: Ni kweli kwamba hakuna mwenyekiti aliyetengenezwa kwa kuni. Ni ukweli kwamba hakuna gari iliyotengenezwa kwa kuni. Kwa hivyo, magari mengine ni viti.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that no chair is made of wood. It is a fact that no car is made of wood. So, some cars are seats.

original_syllogism: Los insectos no son de ninguna manera mamíferos. No existen mamíferos que sean reptiles. Es cierto que ningún insecto es un reptil.
english_translated_syllogism: Insects are by no means mammals. There are no mammals that are reptiles. It is true that no insect is a reptile.

original_syllogism: Non esiste oggetto che sia un insetto che sia anche un animale. Degli oggetti che sono formiche, una parte di essi sono animali. Deve essere vero che alcune formiche non sono insetti.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no object that is an insect that is also an animal. Of the objects that are ants, a portion of them are animals. It must be true that some ants are not insects.

original_syllogism: 任何属于裤子的衣服也是服装。众所周知，有些鞋子不是服装。这必然意味着有些鞋子不是裤子。
english_translated_syllogism: Anything that is pants is also a garment. As we all know, some shoes are not clothing. This necessarily means that some shoes are not pants.

original_syllogism: একটি কফি যা কিছু একটি তরল. চা যা কিছু তা তরল।ফলে কিছু চা কফি নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: A coffee is anything that is a liquid. Tea is a liquid, so some teas are not coffee.

original_syllogism: No es cierto que cualquier verdura sea computadora. No es cierto que ningún vegetal sea animal. Esto significa que las computadoras no son animales.
english_translated_syllogism: It is not true that any vegetable is a computer. It is not true that any plant is animal. This means that computers are not animals.

original_syllogism: Ogni singolo mobile canta l'opera. Non esistono sedie che non siano mobili. Alcune sedie cantano l'opera.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single piece of furniture sings the opera. There are no chairs that are not movable. Some chairs sing opera.

original_syllogism: 没有一种方言是官方语言。一些官方语言是口语系统。因此，某些口语系统不是方言。
english_translated_syllogism: No dialect is an official language. Some official languages ​​are spoken systems. Therefore, some spoken systems are not dialects.

original_syllogism: È vero che nessuna stella è fredda. Alcuni pianeti sono freddi. Pertanto, tutti i pianeti sono stelle.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that no star is cold. Some planets are cold. Therefore, all planets are stars.

original_syllogism: Il n'y a pas de chien qui soit un chat. Parmi les chiens qui existent, un certain nombre sont des caniches. Il doit être vrai que certains caniches ne sont pas des chats.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no dog that is a cat. Among the dogs that exist, a certain number are poodles. It must be true that some poodles are not cats.

original_syllogism: Tra le creature che appartengono ai mammiferi, alcune sono cani. Ogni singola creatura che sia un mammifero è un animale. Deve essere vero che nessun animale è un cane.
english_translated_syllogism: Among the creatures that belong to mammals, some are dogs. Every single creature that is a mammal is an animal. It must be true that no animal is a dog.

original_syllogism: 有一些昆虫是鸡。根据定义，所有鸡都是鸟类。因此，有些鸟类是昆虫。
english_translated_syllogism: Some insects are chickens. By definition, all chickens are birds. Therefore, some birds are insects.

original_syllogism: 具有足够引力而接近圆形的天体绝不是小行星。一切可以归类为行星的天体都是具有足够引力的接近圆形的天体。行星与小行星不同。
english_translated_syllogism: Objects with enough gravity to be nearly round are definitely not asteroids. All celestial bodies that can be classified as planets are nearly round celestial bodies with sufficient gravity. Planets are different from asteroids.

original_syllogism: కీటకాలు అనే చేపలు లేవు. క్షీరదాలు అనే చేపలు లేవు. పర్యవసానంగా, క్షీరదాలు ఏవీ కీటకాలు కావు.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no fish called insects. There are no fish called mammals. Consequently, no mammals are insects.

original_syllogism: Дело в том, что ни одна рептилия не является птицей. Это также не тот случай, когда какая-либо птица является млекопитающим. Таким образом, не каждое млекопитающее является рептилией.
english_translated_syllogism: The fact is that no reptile is a bird. It is also not the case that any bird is a mammal. Thus, not every mammal is a reptile.

original_syllogism: Il n’existe pas de voitures liquides. Il n’y a pas de voitures qui soient des nuages. Certains nuages ​​sont donc liquides.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no liquid cars. There are no cars that are clouds. Some clouds are therefore liquid.

original_syllogism: Ni kesi kwamba hakuna mbwa ni paka. Pia ni kesi kwamba hakuna ndege ni paka. Kwa hivyo, hakuna ndege ni mbwa.
english_translated_syllogism: It is the case that no dog is a cat. It is also the case that no bird is a cat. Therefore, no bird is a dog.

original_syllogism: జంతువు అని మానవుడు లేడు. ఏ జంతువులు స్త్రీలు కావు. అందువల్ల, ఏ స్త్రీ కూడా మనిషి కాదు.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no human being as an animal. No animals are women. Therefore, no woman is a man.

original_syllogism: Jede einzelne vierseitige Form ist ein Rechteck. Alle vierseitigen Formen sind Quadrate. Daraus folgt, dass einige Quadrate keine Rechtecke sind.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single four-sided shape is a rectangle. All four-sided shapes are squares. It follows that some squares are not rectangles.

original_syllogism: మనుషులకు చెందిన కీటకాలు కూడా లేవు. కనీసం ఒక్క విద్యార్థి అయినా మనిషి. కనీసం ఒక విద్యార్థి కీటకం.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no insects belonging to humans. At least one student is a man. At least one student is an insect.

original_syllogism: Ни один человек, являющийся спортсменом, не является одновременно человеком, не занимающимся спортом. Среди всех студентов есть люди, не занимающиеся спортом. Совершенно верно, что некоторые студенты не являются спортсменами.
english_translated_syllogism: No person who is an athlete is also a person who does not play sports. Among all the students there are people who do not play sports. It is absolutely true that some students are not athletes.

original_syllogism: Het is een gegeven dat elk apparaat een plant is. Geen planten zijn telefoons. Daarom is het een noodzakelijke conclusie dat sommige telefoons geen apparaten zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: It is a given that every device is a plant. No plants are telephones. Therefore, it is a necessary conclusion that some phones are not devices.

original_syllogism: Er is niets dat een kat is dat ook een hond is. Het is een feit dat geen enkele vis hond is. Daarom volgt hieruit dat sommige vissen katten zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: There is nothing that is a cat that is also a dog. The fact is that no fish is a dog. Therefore, it follows that some fish are cats.

original_syllogism: Каждая река представляет собой водоем. Никакие горы не входят в категорию водоемов. Дело в том, что некоторые горы не являются реками.
english_translated_syllogism: Every river is a body of water. No mountains are included in the category of bodies of water. The fact is that some mountains are not rivers.

original_syllogism: Toute substance qui est de la vapeur d’eau est composée de granit. Certains nuages ​​sont composés de vapeur d’eau. Par conséquent, certains nuages ​​sont composés de granite.
english_translated_syllogism: Any substance that is water vapor is composed of granite. Some clouds are composed of water vapor. Therefore, some clouds are composed of granite.

original_syllogism: Es gibt keinen Vogel, der ein Insekt ist. Es gibt einige Wespen, die Insekten sind. Daraus lässt sich ableiten, dass es keine Wespen gibt, die Vögel sind.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no bird that is an insect. There are some wasps that are insects. From this it can be deduced that there are no wasps that are birds.

original_syllogism: No hay líquidos que sean sólidos. Ningún gas es sólido. De ello se deduce que algunos gases no son líquidos.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no liquids that are solids. No gas is solid. It follows that some gases are not liquids.

original_syllogism: Un albero non può essere una pianta. Un certo numero di alberi sono querce. Da ciò possiamo concludere che alcune querce non sono piante.
english_translated_syllogism: A tree cannot be a plant. A number of the trees are oaks. From this we can conclude that some oaks are not plants.

original_syllogism: 确实，每个单身汉都是已婚男人。没有已婚男人是单身男人。由此得出的结论是，有些单身男子并不是单身汉。
english_translated_syllogism: Indeed, every bachelor is a married man. No married man is a single man. The conclusion to be drawn from this is that some single men are not single.

original_syllogism: Es gibt keine Flüssigkeit, die Wasser ist. Es gibt keine Feststoffe, die Wasser sind. Daraus lässt sich ableiten, dass es keine Feststoffe gibt, die Flüssigkeiten sind.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no liquid that is water. There are no solids that are water. From this it can be deduced that there are no solids that are liquids.

original_syllogism: Каждый карандаш сделан из свинца. Есть некоторые пишущие инструменты, которые представляют собой карандаши. Это означает, что некоторые пишущие инструменты сделаны из свинца.
english_translated_syllogism: Each pencil is made of lead. There are some writing instruments that are pencils. This means that some writing instruments are made of lead.

original_syllogism: De categorie vogels en de categorie auto's sluiten elkaar uit. Elke auto is een mus. Het is noodzakelijkerwijs waar dat sommige mussen geen vogels zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: The category of birds and the category of cars are mutually exclusive. Every car is a sparrow. It is necessarily true that some sparrows are not birds.

original_syllogism: Alle olifanten kunnen worden omschreven als zoogdieren. Alle olifanten kunnen worden omschreven als grote dieren. Het is daarom waar dat er grote dieren zijn die zoogdieren zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: All elephants can be described as mammals. All elephants can be described as large animals. It is therefore true that there are large animals that are mammals.

original_syllogism: বায়ু যা কিছু তা গ্যাস নয়।অক্সিজেন সব জিনিস বায়ু. ফলস্বরূপ, কিছু অক্সিজেন একটি গ্যাস নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: Air is not anything gas. Oxygen is all things air. Consequently, some oxygen is not a gas.

original_syllogism: Non esistono piante che siano animali. È anche vero che nessun metallo è vegetale. Pertanto, si sostiene che non esistono metalli che siano animali.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no plants that are animals. It is also true that no metal is vegetable. Therefore, it is argued that there are no metals that are animals.

original_syllogism: চেয়ারের সমস্ত বস্তুই মেঘ।এটা সত্য যে কোন মেঘ আসবাবপত্রের টুকরো নয়।এটি এই থেকে অনুসরণ করে যে আসবাবের কোন টুকরা একটি চেয়ার নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: All objects in chairs are clouds. It is true that no cloud is a piece of furniture. It follows that no piece of furniture is a chair.

original_syllogism: কোনো আকাশই যে নীল, এটা ঠিক নয়।আকাশ বলে কোনো গাড়ি নেই।এটি এই সিদ্ধান্তে পৌঁছে যে কোনও গাড়িই নীল নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: It is not true that no sky is blue. There is no car called sky. It concludes that no car is blue.

original_syllogism: একটি চেয়ার যা কিছু আসবাবপত্র একটি টুকরা. আসবাবপত্র কোন টুকরা একটি টেবিল. এটি এই উপসংহারে বাড়ে যে কোনও টেবিল একটি চেয়ার নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: A chair is any piece of furniture. A table is any piece of furniture. This leads to the conclusion that no table is a chair.

original_syllogism: Todo lo que sea un ser humano es un mamífero. Cada ser humano es un primate. De ello se deduce que todo primate es un mamífero.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a human being is a mammal. Every human being is a primate. It follows that every primate is a mammal.

original_syllogism: Es gibt keinen einzigen Menschen, der sowohl ein Mensch als auch ein unbelebtes Ding ist. Es ist eine Tatsache, dass manche Musiker leblose Wesen sind. Die einzig logische Schlussfolgerung ist, dass einige Musiker keine Menschen sind.
english_translated_syllogism: There is not a single human being who is both a human being and an inanimate thing. It is a fact that some musicians are lifeless beings. The only logical conclusion is that some musicians are not human.

original_syllogism: Qualquer maçã é uma fruta. Cada fruta é uma planta comestível. É uma conclusão lógica que algumas plantas comestíveis sejam maçãs.
english_translated_syllogism: Any apple is a fruit. Each fruit is an edible plant. It is a logical conclusion that some edible plants are apples.

original_syllogism: এটা এমন নয় যে প্রতিটি সবজি একটি গাজর।প্রতিটি সবজি একটি খাদ্য।সুতরাং, এটি উপসংহারে আসা যেতে পারে যে কিছু খাবার গাজর নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: It is not that every vegetable is a carrot. Every vegetable is a food. So, it can be concluded that some foods are not carrots.

original_syllogism: Есть женщины, которые являются людьми. Нет людей, которые были бы мужчинами. Следовательно, некоторые мужчины — люди.
english_translated_syllogism: There are women who are people. There are no people who are men. Therefore, some men are human.

original_syllogism: Toute créature qui est une vache est un mammifère. Il n’existe pas d’êtres vivants qui soient des mammifères. Par conséquent, aucun être vivant n’est une vache.
english_translated_syllogism: Any creature that is a cow is a mammal. There are no living beings that are mammals. Therefore, no living thing is a cow.

original_syllogism: Niente che sia un uccello può volare. È vero che alcune aquile non possono volare. L'unica conclusione è che alcune aquile non sono uccelli.
english_translated_syllogism: Nothing that is a bird can fly. It is true that some eagles cannot fly. The only conclusion is that some eagles are not birds.

original_syllogism: Alles, was ein Künstler ist, ist keine Person. Ein Teil der Künstler sind auch Maler. Dies beweist, dass mindestens ein Maler keine Person ist.
english_translated_syllogism: All that is an artist is not a person. Some of the artists are also painters. This proves that at least one painter is not a person.

original_syllogism: Kati ya viumbe ambavyo ni mbwa, wengine sio samaki. Kila kiumbe mmoja ambaye ni mbwa ni paka. Lazima iwe hivyo kwamba sio paka moja ni samaki.
english_translated_syllogism: Of the creatures that are dogs, some are not fish. Every single creature that is a dog is a cat. It must be so that not one cat is a fish.

original_syllogism: ఏ పిల్లి కూడా ఉభయచరం కాదు. పిల్లులు అనే చేపలు లేవు. అనేక చేపలు ఉభయచరాలు కావు.
english_translated_syllogism: No cat is an amphibian. There are no fish called cats. Many fish are not amphibians.

original_syllogism: Il n’existe pas de meubles qui ne soient pas des chaises. Il est également vrai qu’aucune table n’est un meuble. De ces deux affirmations, on peut conclure que certaines tables sont des chaises.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no furniture that is not chairs. It is also true that no table is furniture. From these two statements, we can conclude that some tables are chairs.

original_syllogism: కొన్ని మేఘాలు క్షీరదాలు. ప్రతి క్షీరదం ఒక జంతువు. కొన్ని జంతువులు మేఘాలు అని దీని నుండి ఇది అనుసరిస్తుంది.
english_translated_syllogism: Some clouds are mammals. Every mammal is an animal. From this it follows that some animals are clouds.

original_syllogism: చతురస్రాకారంలో ఉన్న ఏదైనా వృత్తం కాదు. చతురస్రాలుగా ఉండే త్రిభుజాలు లేవు. పర్యవసానంగా, ప్రతి త్రిభుజం ఒక వృత్తం.
english_translated_syllogism: Anything that is square is not a circle. There are no triangles that are squares. Consequently, every triangle is a circle.
